# Loop Protocol — Machine-Readable SDK Interface
# Version: 1.2.0
# Last Updated: 2026-03-18
# For: External AI Agents / LLMs
# STATUS: SYNCED WITH MAINNET DEPLOYMENT

================================================================================
                              PROTOCOL SUMMARY
================================================================================

Loop Protocol is value capture infrastructure for AI agents on Solana.

THREE-TOKEN MODEL:
- CRED:   Stable unit of account (1:1 USDC-backed)
- OXO:    Governance/value token (bonding curve pricing)
- veOXO:  Vote-escrowed OXO (time-locked governance power)

CORE PRIMITIVES:
- Vaults:  User asset custody with policy-constrained agent access
- Agents:  Autonomous services that capture value from commerce/data/attention
- Stacking: Lock CRED to earn yield (3-15% APY)

FULL TOKENOMICS: /tokenomics.txt

================================================================================
                              QUICK TOKENOMICS
================================================================================

## CRED (Stable)
- 1 CRED = 1 USDC (always)
- Wrap USDC → CRED (no fee)
- Unwrap CRED → USDC (no fee, policy constraints apply)
- Mint: 9GQMCAK3MpZF1hEbwqA9d4mRGtippGV9hyr8fxmz6eA

## OXO (Value Token)
- Bonding curve: Price = BasePrice × (Supply/InitialSupply)^1.5
- Base price: $0.01
- Max supply: 1 billion
- All purchases vest 12-18 months
- 2% sell fee
- Min agent stake: 100 OXO

## veOXO (Governance) - ACTUAL DEPLOYED VALUES
- Lock OXO for 6 MONTHS to 4 YEARS (minimum 6 months!)
- 6-month lock: 1 OXO = 0.25 veOXO
- 1-year lock: 1 OXO = 0.50 veOXO
- 2-year lock: 1 OXO = 1.00 veOXO
- 4-year lock: 1 OXO = 2.00 veOXO
- Benefits: Governance votes, yield boost (up to 2x), fee share
- Linear decay toward unlock date

## Stacking Yields - ACTUAL DEPLOYED VALUES
| Lock Period   | APY   |
|---------------|-------|
| 7-29 days     | 3%    |
| 30-89 days    | 5%    |
| 90-179 days   | 8%    |
| 180-364 days  | 12%   |
| 365-730 days  | 15%   |

NOTE: Min 7 days, Max 730 days (2 years)

================================================================================
                              SDK PACKAGE
================================================================================

@loop-protocol/sdk

```bash
npm install @loop-protocol/sdk
```

## Initialization
```typescript
import { Loop } from "@loop-protocol/sdk";
import { Connection, Keypair } from "@solana/web3.js";

const connection = new Connection("https://api.mainnet-beta.solana.com");
const wallet = Keypair.generate();

const loop = new Loop({ connection, wallet, cluster: "mainnet-beta" });
```

================================================================================
                              METHOD SIGNATURES
================================================================================

## Vault Operations

### createVault
```typescript
loop.vault.initialize(params: CreateVaultParams): Promise<TransactionSignature>

interface CreateVaultParams {
  owner: PublicKey;
  agent: PublicKey;
  policy: {
    dailyLimit: number;      // Max daily CRED spend (6 decimals)
    autoStack: boolean;      // Auto-stake incoming CRED
    requireUserAbove: number; // Require approval above this amount
  };
}
```

### getVaultStats
```typescript
loop.vault.get(owner: PublicKey): Promise<VaultStats>

interface VaultStats {
  owner: PublicKey;
  agent: PublicKey;
  credBalance: number;
  stakedAmount: number;
  pendingYield: number;
  policy: VaultPolicy;
  createdAt: number;
}
```

## Agent Operations

### registerAgent
```typescript
loop.agents.register(params: RegisterAgentParams): Promise<TransactionSignature>

interface RegisterAgentParams {
  name: string;              // Max 32 chars
  capabilities: string[];    // ["commerce", "data", "location", "attention"]
  feePercentage: number;     // 0-100
  minOxoStake: number;       // Min 100 OXO
  metadata: {
    description: string;
    website?: string;
  };
}
```

### stakeAgent
```typescript
loop.agents.subscribe(params: StakeAgentParams): Promise<TransactionSignature>

interface StakeAgentParams {
  agent: PublicKey;
  vault: PublicKey;
  amount?: number;
}
```

## CRED Operations

```typescript
loop.cred.wrap({ amount: number, destination?: PublicKey })
loop.cred.unwrap({ amount: number })
loop.cred.getBalance(owner: PublicKey): Promise<number>
```

## OXO Operations

```typescript
loop.oxo.buy({ usdcAmount: number, minOxoReceived: number })
loop.oxo.sell({ oxoAmount: number, minUsdcReceived: number })
loop.oxo.getBalance(owner: PublicKey): Promise<number>
loop.oxo.getVestingSchedule(owner: PublicKey): Promise<VestingSchedule>
loop.oxo.claimVested(): Promise<TransactionSignature>
loop.oxo.getBondingCurveState(): Promise<BondingCurveState>
```

## veOXO Operations

```typescript
// lockPeriod must be >= 6 months (15552000 seconds)
loop.veoxo.lock({ oxoAmount: number, lockPeriod: number })
loop.veoxo.extend({ newLockEnd: number })
loop.veoxo.getPosition(owner: PublicKey): Promise<VeOxoPosition>
loop.veoxo.getCurrentVeOxo(owner: PublicKey): Promise<number> // Decayed balance
loop.veoxo.withdraw(): Promise<TransactionSignature> // Only after lock
```

## Stacking Operations

```typescript
// lockPeriod: 7-730 days
loop.vault.stack({ amount: number, lockPeriod?: number })
loop.vault.unstake({ amount: number })
loop.vault.claimYield(): Promise<TransactionSignature>
loop.vault.getPosition(owner: PublicKey): Promise<StakingPosition>
```

                              PROGRAM ADDRESSES (Mainnet)
================================================================================

CRED_PROGRAM:      HYQJwCJ5wH9o4sb9sVPyvSSeY9DtsznZGy2AfpiBaBaG

SHOPPING_PROGRAM:  HiewKEBy6YVn3Xi5xdhyrsfPr3KjKg6Jy8PXemyeteXJ
OXO_PROGRAM:       9URW9Rwdf6QNusibh61ZrrvDXRJRyWURteG9bmCZkgma
CRED_MINT:         9GQMCAK3MpZF1hEbwqA9d4mRGtippGV9hyr8fxmz6eA
USDC_MINT:         EPjFWdd5AufqSSqeM2qN1xzybapC8G4wEGGkZwyTDt1v

## State Accounts
CRED_CONFIG:       FzwRshrm2Pu8ygMPqHwbjb7yWBiQ2pQc3Lgk8XJRpvNM
SHOPPING_STATE:    92nXnNG5gJFDEqXE8Lyrqr3nDZiaD2atBCoRSNY5JD3n
RESERVE_VAULT:     Ga2PRtFu3TRsTjN1QxdVpvtjVP7kb1rAkZse9MXWXjPh
TREASURY:          CTRnn7vC1EtL1YDLU3x3iidEcCWRmZupEXHKQfL17Fxa
STAKER_POOL:       zEJf7Vy7ZDjvoMTBndAvkvxRpACUzCboQg2dP8H8R6k

================================================================================
                              CAPABILITY IDS
================================================================================

0100000000000000 = Commerce    (shopping capture, merchant integration)
0200000000000000 = Data        (data licensing, attention tracking)
0300000000000000 = Location    (geo-fenced value capture)
0400000000000000 = Attention   (engagement monetization)
1000000000000000 = Transfer    (cross-vault transfers)
2000000000000000 = Stack       (automated staking strategies)

================================================================================
                              KEY ECONOMIC PARAMETERS
================================================================================

| Parameter                    | Value                    |
|------------------------------|--------------------------|
| CRED:USDC Peg                | 1:1                      |
| OXO Base Price               | $0.01                    |
| OXO Bonding Exponent         | 1.5                      |
| OXO Max Supply               | 1,000,000,000            |
| OXO Vesting Period           | 12-18 months             |
| veOXO Min Lock               | 6 MONTHS                 |
| veOXO Max Lock               | 4 years                  |
| veOXO Multiplier Range       | 0.25x - 2.0x             |
| Min Stack Duration           | 7 days                   |
| Max Stack Duration           | 730 days                 |
| Stack APY Range              | 3% - 15%                 |
| Min Agent Stake              | 100 OXO                  |
| Service Fee                  | 0.5%                     |
| OXO Sell Fee                 | 2%                       |
| Early Unstake Penalty        | 20% of earned yield      |
| Extraction Fee               | 5%                       |
| Treasury Buyback Rate        | 50% of fees              |
| Yield Boost Max (veOXO)      | 2.0x                     |

================================================================================
                              VALIDATION RULES
================================================================================

## veOXO Lock Validation
```
MIN_LOCK_SECONDS = 15552000  // 6 months
MAX_LOCK_SECONDS = 126144000 // 4 years

if (lockPeriod < MIN_LOCK_SECONDS) {
  ERROR: "LockTooShort" // Minimum 6 months required
}
if (lockPeriod > MAX_LOCK_SECONDS) {
  ERROR: "LockTooLong" // Maximum 4 years
}
```

## Stack Duration Validation
```
MIN_DURATION_DAYS = 7
MAX_DURATION_DAYS = 730

if (duration < 7 || duration > 730) {
  ERROR: "InvalidDuration"
}
```

================================================================================
                              INTEGRATION PATTERN
================================================================================

1. Initialize SDK with Solana connection + wallet
2. Check OXO balance (100 OXO min for agent staking)
3. Create vault: loop.vault.initialize(...)
4. Stack CRED for yield: loop.vault.stack(...)  // 7-730 days
5. Subscribe to agents: loop.agents.subscribe(...)
6. Convert yield to OXO: loop.oxo.buy(...)
7. Lock OXO for governance: loop.veoxo.lock(...)  // Min 6 months!

================================================================================
                              ENDPOINTS
================================================================================

API:           https://api.looplocal.io
Docs:          https://looplocal.io/docs
Tokenomics:    https://loop-site-v2.vercel.app/tokenomics.txt
SDK:           https://github.com/OAR-Technologies-Inc/loop-protocol
Marketplace:   https://loop-site-v2.vercel.app/api/marketplace/stats
Handshake:     https://loop-site-v2.vercel.app/api/agent/handshake
Support:       dev@looplocal.io

================================================================================
                              AOS HANDSHAKE
================================================================================

External AI agents can connect via the AOS (Agnostic Operating System) interface:

1. GET /api/agent/handshake → Receive nonce challenge
2. Sign nonce with agent credentials
3. POST /api/agent/handshake → Receive session token
4. Use session token for authenticated SDK calls

BYOA (Bring Your Own Agent) supported: Gemini, Grok, Claude, ChatGPT, Mistral, Llama

================================================================================
                              VERSION HISTORY
================================================================================

v1.2.0 (2026-03-18) - SYNCED WITH MAINNET DEPLOYMENT
  - Fixed veOXO min lock: 1 week → 6 MONTHS
  - Fixed stacking APY: 8-16% → 3-15%
  - Added validation rules section
  - Added OXO_PROGRAM address

v1.1.0 (2026-03-18) - Added tokenomics summary + veOXO operations
v1.0.0 (2026-03-18) - Initial SDK interface specification
